message:
fix(fcp-store): mark objects with placement policy but no symbol distribution as not meeting policy

When snapshot_zone_lifecycle encounters an object that has a placement
policy but no symbol distribution (i.e. no symbols have been stored
yet), it now sets meets_placement_policy to false instead of leaving
it as None.  Previously the missing-distribution branch only set
reconstructable to false, which meant objects in this state appeared
as "unknown" for policy compliance rather than explicitly failing.

Adds test snapshot_zone_lifecycle_marks_missing_symbol_distribution_as_not_meeting_policy
to verify the corrected behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
